author: jdthomas24
description: Custom Hubitat driver for SmartThings Zigbee motion sensors with local processing and battery reporting.
releaseNotes: v1.7.8 - Updated battery voltage curve for CR2 lithium chemistry (previous curve was tuned for CR2450/CR2477 coin cells). Default battery reporting interval changed from 60 to 240 minutes to improve Battery Monitor drain rate accuracy.
